description: Ketubba. Location: Alexandria. Dating: ca. 1143 CE. Bride: Zayn al-Dār bt. Ḥananʾel ha-Levi. Groom: [...] b. Sahl. Marriage payments: 10 + 25. No dowry. Witnesses include Avraham b. Ḥārith ha-Levi ‘elder of the congregations’, Sahlān b. ʿImran, Yefet b. Naḥum. The validation is signed by Aharon b. Yeshuʿa the physician, Shela b. Moshe ha-Levi, and Yiṣḥaq b. Yosef. (Information from CUDL and Goitein's index card.)
